query: INSERT INTO bupa_prerequisites (service_name, icd_codes, requirements) VALUES ('Medical Equipment - BP Machine', 'I10, I11', '3 BP readings at different occasions.'), ('Medical Equipment - Nebulizer', 'J45, J40', 'Clinical findings and diagnosis.'), ('Medical Equipment - Hearing Aid', 'H90, H91', 'Audiometry and Tympanometry if applicable.'), ('Medical Equipment - CPAP for OSA', 'G47.33, G47.20', 'Sleep Study Report.'), ('Medical Equipment - Insulin Pump', 'E10, E11', 'A- Documented report demonstrating treatment attempts with multiple daily injections for at least 6 months, including drug prescriptions. B- Documented blood glucose readings for the last two months. C- Documented medical visit reports highlighting attempts to adjust insulin administration and self-management during the visits. D- A documented report confirming that the patient has completed a diabetes education training program satisfactorily, including self-care processes and follow-up procedures. E- A minimum of two HbA1c lab results, each taken recently (within the last 3 months) and spaced at least 3 months apart.');

B- Documented blood glucose readings for the last two months. C- Documented medical visit reports highlighting attempts to adjust insulin administration and self-management during the visits. D- A documented report confirming that the patient has completed a diabetes education training program satisfactorily, including self-care processes and follow-up procedures. E- A minimum of two HbA1c lab results, each taken recently (within the last 3 months) and spaced at least 3 months apart.');
